---
title: "All About Me"
---


## Who I Am

*"Versatile business professional with a creative mindset, proven adaptability, and a 
drive to deliver results in fast-paced environments."*

I am an MSc Business Analytics student at DCU and a Trainee Accountant at the Mercantile 
Group in Dublin. Over the past three years, I have been building experience understanding the meaning within numbers. Now, it is time to bridges two 
worlds - financial accountability and data-driven decision making.

I believe the most valuable professionals in modern business are those who can read 
numbers *and* understand the story behind them. That is what I am working towards.

---

## 💼 Professional Experience

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Trainee Accountant - The Mercantile Group** · September 2023 - Present

Running management accounts for Beatty Solid Fuels and handling Accounts Payable & 
Receivable for Stafford Fuels across three solid fuel companies including Shamrock Products 
Limited. Responsible for creditor dealings, invoicing, payment processing, bank/credit 
reconciliations, supplier relations, and inventory management — all while completing ACCA 
exams simultaneously.
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Support Tax Accountant - Oracle (EMEA Tax Compliance Team)** · July 2021 - May 2022

INTRA placement assisting Oracle's EMEA Tax Compliance Team with tax roll forwards, monthly 
tax payments, and administrative work across entities in the EMEA region. First experience 
in a large multinational professional environment.
:::

---

## 🎓 Education

| Qualification | Institution | Period |
|---|---|---|
| MSc Business Analytics | Dublin City University | Sept 2025 - Aug 2026 |
| BSc Business Studies | Dublin City University | 2019 - 2023 (2nd Class Honours Grade 1) |
| ACCA | Association of Chartered Certified Accountants | Part-Qualified : *In Progress* [^1] |
| Post-Primary | Castleknock Community College | 2013 - 2019 |

[^1]: Completing the ACCA qualification alongside working at the Mercantile Group

---

## 🧮 Accountancy Skills

| Area | Detail |
|---|---|
| Qualification | ACCA Part-Qualified (BT, MA, FA - all 80%+) |
| Experience | Trainee Accountant, 3 years |
| Responsibilities | Management accounts, AP/AR, reconciliations, creditor management |
| Previous Experience | Oracle EMEA Tax Compliance (INTRA placement) |

---

## 📊 Analytics & Technical Skills

| Skill | Level |
|---|---|
| Python | Beginner-Intermediate |
| SQL | Beginner-Intermediate |
| Machine Learning | Applied (scikit-learn, BERT, GPT) |
| Data Visualisation | Plotly, Matplotlib, Streamlit |
| Microsoft Excel | Certified |
| Microsoft Word | Certified |
| Microsoft PowerPoint | Certified |
| Research Methods | CRISP-DM, PRISMA, Mixed Methods |

---

## 🎯 Goals

::: {.callout-note}
My goal is to complete my ACCA qualification while deepening my expertise in data analytics 
and machine learning. I want to work at the intersection of finance and technology - helping 
organisations make smarter decisions by combining financial thinking with modern 
analytical tools.
:::

- Complete ACCA qualification and become a fully chartered accountant
- Deepen Python, SQL, and machine learning skills through real-world projects
- Build a career combining financial expertise with business analytics
- Work in financial analytics, FP&A, or data-driven consulting

---

## 📜 Certifications

- ✅ Microsoft Excel - Certified
- ✅ Microsoft Word - Certified
- ✅ Microsoft PowerPoint - Certified
- ✅ Data Ethics & Risk - Kubicle Certifications [^2]
- ✅ Data Security - Kubicle Certifications [^3]
- ✅ Data Presentation Skills - Kubicle Certifications [^4]
- ✅ AI Fundamentals - Kubicle Certifications [^5]

[^2]: *"Applying Ethical Thinking in Data Ethics & Risk"* & *"Intro to Data Ethics in Data Ethics & Risk"*
[^3]: *"Keeping Your Information Safe in Data Security"* & *"Handling Data Securely & Responsibly in Data Security"*
[^4]: *"Presenting Your Data"* , *"Telling Stories with Data"* & *"Communicating Data Effectively"*
[^5]: *"Exploring CHATGPT"* , *"Prompt Engineering"* , *"Large Language Models"* & *"Intro to Gen AI"*

---

::: {.callout-note}
Want to know more about my work? Head over to the [Projects page](projects/index.qmd) 
or [get in touch](contact.qmd).
:::

::: {.callout-note}
Want to know more about my life outside work and college? Head over to the [Beyond the Desk page](personal/personal.qmd).
:::
